name: nova-image
description: 知意图 - AI 图像生成工作台

scripts.dev: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node server.js
scripts.dev:static: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node server.js
scripts.start: cd backend && cross-env HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node server.js
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
